=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (14:14-14:24) TS377031: This layer construction leaves `Scope` in the requirement set. The scoped API removes `Scope` from the resulting requirements. effect(scopeInLayerEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable scopeInLayerEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable scopeInLayerEffect for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable scopeInLayerEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable scopeInLayerEffect for entire file"

[D3] (23:11-23:12) TS6133: '_' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

[D4] (37:24-43:2) TS377031: This layer construction leaves `Scope` in the requirement set. The scoped API removes `Scope` from the resulting requirements. effect(scopeInLayerEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable scopeInLayerEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable scopeInLayerEffect for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Use scoped for Layer creation"

[D5] (45:25-52:2) TS377031: This layer construction leaves `Scope` in the requirement set. The scoped API removes `Scope` from the resulting requirements. effect(scopeInLayerEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable scopeInLayerEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable scopeInLayerEffect for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Use scoped for Layer creation"

[D6] (48:11-48:24) TS6133: '_otherService' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable scopeInLayerEffect for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable scopeInLayerEffect for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable scopeInLayerEffect for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable scopeInLayerEffect for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable scopeInLayerEffect for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable scopeInLayerEffect for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Use scoped for Layer creation" ===

--- file:///.src/scopeInLayerEffect.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Context from "effect/Context"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import * as Layer from "effect/Layer"

class MyService extends Context.Tag("MyService")<MyService, {
  a: number
}>() {}

class OtherService extends Context.Tag("OtherService")<OtherService, {
  b: number
}>() {}

export class MyService2 extends Effect.Service<MyService2>()("MyService2", {
  effect: Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.addFinalizer(() => Effect.log("finalizer"))
    return { a: 1 }
  })
}) {}

export class MyService3 extends Effect.Service<MyService3>()("MyService2", {
  effect: Effect.gen(function*() {
    const _ = yield* OtherService
    yield* Effect.addFinalizer(() => Effect.log("finalizer"))
    return { a: 1 }
  })
}) {}

export const shouldNotReport = Layer.scoped(
  MyService,
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.addFinalizer(() => Effect.log("finalizer"))
    return { a: 1 }
  })
)

export const myLayer = Layer.scoped(
  MyService,
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.addFinalizer(() => Effect.log("finalizer"))
    return { a: 1 }
  })
)

export const myLayer2 = Layer.effect(
  MyService,
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    const _otherService = yield* OtherService
    yield* Effect.addFinalizer(() => Effect.log("finalizer"))
    return { a: 1 }
  })
)


=== [D5] Fix 0: "Disable scopeInLayerEffect for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 1: "Disable scopeInLayerEffect for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 2: "Use scoped for Layer creation" ===

--- file:///.src/scopeInLayerEffect.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Context from "effect/Context"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import * as Layer from "effect/Layer"

class MyService extends Context.Tag("MyService")<MyService, {
  a: number
}>() {}

class OtherService extends Context.Tag("OtherService")<OtherService, {
  b: number
}>() {}

export class MyService2 extends Effect.Service<MyService2>()("MyService2", {
  effect: Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.addFinalizer(() => Effect.log("finalizer"))
    return { a: 1 }
  })
}) {}

export class MyService3 extends Effect.Service<MyService3>()("MyService2", {
  effect: Effect.gen(function*() {
    const _ = yield* OtherService
    yield* Effect.addFinalizer(() => Effect.log("finalizer"))
    return { a: 1 }
  })
}) {}

export const shouldNotReport = Layer.scoped(
  MyService,
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.addFinalizer(() => Effect.log("finalizer"))
    return { a: 1 }
  })
)

export const myLayer = Layer.effect(
  MyService,
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.addFinalizer(() => Effect.log("finalizer"))
    return { a: 1 }
  })
)

export const myLayer2 = Layer.scoped(
  MyService,
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    const _otherService = yield* OtherService
    yield* Effect.addFinalizer(() => Effect.log("finalizer"))
    return { a: 1 }
  })
)
